results.justification: Rubric-based evaluation with per-criterion binary judgment + criterion-level reward IS the 8-criterion binary classifier vector mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — unified rubric framework with structured criterion-vector lookup IS the 8-bit vector index into 256-cell catalog.
Rubric-grounded RL with multi-dimensional structured judge rewards covers the multi-criterion-vector evaluation paradigm.
Fixed catalog of dedicated evaluators (Hallucination, Toxicity, Helpfulness, etc) covers the fixed-criterion catalog paradigm.
Criterion-level binary/categorical scoring + lookup-table-style verdict IS the 8-bit-signature-to-256-cell mechanism.

results.matched_effect_cluster: LLM hierarchical binary decision tree tabular
results.justification: Hierarchical sequence of binary classifiers as decision tree covers the 8-bit signature → 256-class lookup paradigm.
Multi-class taxonomy classification with 256-class catalog covers the verdict-cell-lookup paradigm.
Per-criterion routing + category-catalog covers the 8-criterion + 256-cell lookup paradigm.
